message:
feat(fs): add BufReader::capacity() accessor and safety doc comments for get_mut/into_inner

src/fs/buf_reader.rs — Added capacity() method that delegates to the inner
buffered reader, returning the internal buffer capacity. This enables
callers to inspect buffer sizing without accessing internals. Added #[must_use]
attribute since discarding the result is always a logic error. Added doc
comments to get_mut() warning that direct inner-reader access may cause
data loss if the buffer contains unread data, and to into_inner() noting
that any buffered unread data will be lost. Added test
test_buf_reader_capacity_delegates verifying delegation correctness.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
